Our Story

Where Fast Food
Meets Soul

Relish World was born in 2002 from a simple belief — fast food should taste like it was made with love. Located in the heart of Anand, we've spent over two decades crafting vegetarian fast food that brings families together.

Every sandwich is grilled to golden perfection. Every dosa made fresh to order. Every bhaji simmered with care you can taste in every single bite.

100%

Pure Vegetarian

Every item, every ingredient — always.

22+

Years Serving

Proudly feeding Anand since 2002.

100+

Menu Items

Sandwiches, dosas, pizzas & more.

♥

Jain Friendly

Jain options across our menu.

Pure Veg

House Favourites

Our Signature Dishes

Signature Since 2002

Bombay Club Sandwich

Cheese, tomato, cucumber, capsicum, onion, beetroot, potato, coriander & mayonnaise — the sandwich that started it all. Loaded. Layered. Legendary.

Fan Favourite

Cheese Paper Masala Dosa

Whisper-thin crispy dosa with masala & melted cheese.

Most Loved

Gardners Pizza

Cheese, capsicum, black olive, corn & mushroom — the one to order.

Loved by every generation.

Masala Dosa

Served with fresh chutneys and sambar, it’s a meal parents trust and adults crave.

Classic

Butter Uttapam

Soft fluffy uttapam with a generous dollop of butter.

Why Relish World

The Relish Promise

01

100% Pure Vegetarian

Our kitchen has never served non-veg. Every ingredient, every sauce is completely vegetarian — eat with total peace of mind.

02

Made Fresh to Order

Every sandwich, dosa, pizza freshly prepared when you order. We don't believe in pre-made — worth every moment of the wait.

03

Family Favourites

From kids who love our cheese garlic bread to adults who swear by our dosas — something for every generation to cherish.

Come Taste
the Difference

Two decades of happiness, one address in Anand.

Happy Customers

Loved by Anand

The Vada Pav here has been my weekly ritual since 2010. Nothing in Gujarat comes close to the taste they have perfected over two decades.
R
Rohan M.
Regular since 2010
The dosa is crispy, the chutney is perfection. A clean, vegetarian haven that has never disappointed in twenty years of visiting.
P

Foodie & Blogger
My students from the university always ask where to eat. I send them all to Relish World. Affordable, authentic, and absolutely wonderful.
A

Professor, Anand University
Our Story

22 Years of Flavour

2002
A Dream Is Born
Relish World opens its doors at B9/10 Sanket Towers, Anand — with a simple promise: pure vegetarian fast food made with love, served fresh every day.
2006
The Queue Grows
Word of mouth brings Anand's students, families, and professionals to our door. The signature Grilled Sandwich becomes a city staple.
2012
Menu Expansion
We introduce the South Indian section — crispy dosas, fluffy uttapam, and rich pav bhaji — honouring India's full flavour map.
2016
1,000 Daily Plates
Relish World surpasses 1,000 plates served per day. A milestone that cements our place as Anand's most beloved fast food institution.
2020
Through Every Storm
We adapted, persisted, and kept our community fed. Relish World stood firm — a testament to the strength of real food and real people.
Today
Still Going Strong
Over two decades later, the same passion, the same recipes, the same smiles. Relish World — where every bite tells a story.
Recognition

Anand's trusted food destination for over two decades

Best Veg Fast Food — Anand
Pure Veg Certified
Zomato Certified Safe
Anand Food Heritage
5,000+ Happy Families
